https://x.com/atomic_chat_hq/status/2057581603811901882
https://x.com/loktar00/status/2057687567403741662/video/1
https://x.com/Alibaba_Qwen/status/2057450220708147250?s=20

In this video, we fully test Qwen 3.7 Max across coding, frontend generation, long-horizon agentic workflows, reasoning, autonomous execution, and creative engineering tasks to see if it can actually compete with frontier models like Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.5, and DeepSeek V4.

What makes Qwen 3.7-Max especially interesting is its focus on the “Agent Era” — sustained autonomous execution across long workflows with strong coding, debugging, planning, and tool-use capabilities.

We test:
🔥 Long-horizon autonomous coding workflows
🔥 3D graphics + frontend engineering
🔥 Real-world agentic coding tasks
🔥 Creative generation benchmarks
🔥 Multi-file refactors + debugging
🔥 Three.js + Next.js app generation
🔥 Performance vs Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1, GPT-5.5 & DeepSeek V4
🔥 Qwen’s massive 1M token context window
🔥 Cross-framework usage with Claude Code & OpenClaw

Alibaba even demonstrated a 35-hour autonomous optimization run with over 1,100 tool calls — and honestly… this model is WAY closer to Anthropic/OpenAI/Google than most people expected.

The AI race is moving FAST.

🔥 Subscribe for more daily AI news, frontier model tests, and agentic AI breakdowns.
